dct_title_s: Australia : Coral Sea and Great Barrier Reefs. Sheet 2
dct_description_sm: Depths shown by soundings; relief by hachures and spot heights.
Shows coasts, shoals, reefs, drainage, roads.
Map text in English; otherwise in Japanese.
Japan Hydrographic Department seal in upper left margin.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Map Collections courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact Branner Earth Sciences Library & Map Collections at brannerlibrary@stanford.edu.
